en.name: Cut the Rope
en.desc: Cut ropes to feed candy to the hungry frog!
en.description: Cut the Rope is a physics-based puzzle game where you cut ropes to guide candy into the mouth of a hungry frog named Om Nom. Use strategy and timing to collect stars and feed the candy to Om Nom across multiple challenging levels.
en.objectives: Cut ropes strategically to guide candy to Om Nom. Collect stars for bonus points. Complete all levels with the highest score possible.
en.howToPlay: Click or swipe to cut ropes. The candy will fall according to physics. Guide it into Om Nom's mouth to complete each level. Collect stars for extra points.

rules.controls: Click or swipe on ropes to cut them. Gravity affects the candy's movement.
mechanics: Feed candy to Om Nom to complete level

tips: Watch how the candy swings before cutting
Cut multiple ropes in sequence for complex paths
Plan your cuts to collect all stars

faq.question: How do I cut a rope?
faq.answer: Click or swipe across a rope to cut it. The candy will then fall or swing based on physics.

faq.question: What are the stars for?
faq.answer: Collect stars for bonus points. Try to get all three stars in each level for the best score!

faq.question: How many levels are there?
faq.answer: This version features 3 progressively challenging levels to test your puzzle-solving skills.

zh.name: 割绳子
zh.desc: 割断绳子把糖果喂给饥饿的小青蛙！
zh.description: 割绳子是一款基于物理的益智游戏，你需要割断绳子引导糖果进入饥饿青蛙Om Nom的嘴里。运用策略和时机收集星星，在多个挑战关卡中把糖果喂给Om Nom。
zh.objectives: 策略性地割断绳子引导糖果到Om Nom处。收集星星获得额外分数。以最高分完成所有关卡。
zh.howToPlay: 点击或滑动割断绳子。糖果会根据物理规律下落。把它引导到Om Nom嘴里完成每关。收集星星获得额外分数。

rules.controls: 点击或滑动绳子来割断它。重力会影响糖果的移动。
mechanics: 糖果根据物理规律下落
收集星星获得额外分数
把糖果喂给Om Nom完成关卡

tips: 观察糖果的摆动再割断
按顺序割断多根绳子创造复杂路径
规划你的切割来收集所有星星
有些关卡需要精确的时机

faq.question: 如何割断绳子？
faq.answer: 点击或滑动绳子来割断它。糖果会根据物理规律下落或摆动。

faq.question: 星星有什么用？
faq.answer: 收集星星获得额外分数。尝试每关都收集三颗星星获得最高分！

faq.question: 有多少关卡？
faq.answer: 这个版本有3个逐渐增加难度的关卡来测试你的解谜能力。
